question: Does your organization encrypt data at rest using AES-256 or equivalent?

Does your organization perform regular vulnerability scans?

Does your organization assess the security posture of third-party vendors?

Does your organization conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs)?
Is your organization compliant with GDPR?
